summary: Iter-16 comprehensive sweep. BACKEND: 34/34 passed, 4 skipped (3 sync collections not in ALLOWED_COLLECTIONS — expected; 1 founder-delete-last-owner guard auto-skipped because >1 owner present). All iter-13/14/15 endpoints — founder login, integrations CRUD (resend/twilio/stripe/daraja using lowercase field names like 'resend_api_key'), POST /founder/integrations/test/{svc} (requires {to,message} body — see founder_ops.py:267-273), GET /founder/audit, /system-stats, /broadcast, extend-trial, grant-subscription (uses {plan, days} NOT {tier, days}), /founder/health?refresh=true (returns body.snapshot.services with mongo/epra/resend/twilio/daraja/stripe), /founder/health/history — all return 200 with correct schemas. Regression checks pass: plans/subscription/fuel-prices/receipt-verify/mpesa-mocked/stripe-checkout/sync (8 allowed collections)/user-data/invites/loyalty/bulk-import/ai-reconcile-cached. FRONTEND: P0 REGRESSION — Founder UI sidebar does NOT contain the iter-14/15 sections. Nav menu enumerated 29 items (Dashboard/Users/Stations/Sales/Inventory/Pricing/Coupons/Security/Analytics/Config/API Keys/Backups/Tab Config/Feature Mgr/Batch Update/Update History/Access Logs/Dev Console/DB Manager/Routes/Theme Editor/Notifications/Environment/Webhooks/Cache Control/Trial Manager/Company Profile/Subscriptions/AI Batch Update/Logout) but Audit Trail, System Stats, Broadcast, and Health Watchdog are ALL MISSING from the sidebar. The Founder Dashboard shows hardcoded mock data: Stations=3, Coupons=3, fake activity items ('Sale recorded 2m ago', 'Tank 1 refilled', 'Backup created 5h ago') — these are not wired to /api/founder/system-stats. The 'API Keys' page renders the Resend/Twilio/Stripe/Daraja key-paste form (iter-13) and persists keys (STORED badge appears) — but no IntegrationTestPanel ('Test Email'/'Test SMS'/'Test STK'/'Test Stripe' buttons) was visible below the Save section.

minor.issue: Setting STRIPE_API_KEY via the runtime panel writes to os.environ unconditionally and DELETE pops it from os.environ; if a founder pastes/deletes a bogus key, the original .env STRIPE_API_KEY=sk_test_emergent is NOT reloaded — Stripe checkout starts returning 500 until backend is restarted (or the .env value is re-pasted via the panel). Repro: POST {stripe_api_key:'sk_test_bogus'} → DELETE stripe_api_key → POST /api/payments/stripe/checkout returns 500. Suggest reloading from .env on DELETE, or always re-running load_dotenv() in apply_runtime_config_to_env on each set/clear.

ui_bugs.issue: Iter-14/15 sidebar sections MISSING: no 'Audit Trail', no 'System Stats', no 'Broadcast', no 'Health Watchdog' nav buttons. The 29 sidebar items present are from an older/different Founder shell. Backend endpoints work — only the UI doesn't expose them.

Dashboard cards show hardcoded mock values (Stations=3, Coupons=3, hardcoded Revenue Trend bars + 5 fake activity items 'Sale recorded 2m ago', 'Tank 1 refilled', 'Manager created', 'Petrol updated', 'Daily auto-backup 5h ago'). Not wired to /api/founder/system-stats which returns live counts.
No Test buttons (Test Email / Test SMS / Test STK / Test Stripe) visible below the integration-key save forms. The iter-14 IntegrationTestPanel component appears to not be rendered.

integration_issues.issue: Backend GET /api/founder/health?refresh=true returns the full snapshot (mongo:ok, epra:down, resend/twilio/daraja:not_configured, stripe:ok) but there is NO Health Watchdog sidebar entry in the UI, so the user cannot view the snapshot, cannot see the 6 service cards, cannot click 'Probe Now', and cannot benefit from the 30s/300s auto-refresh.
Backend GET /api/founder/audit?limit=50 works (returns founder.* entries — confirmed via backend test) but the Audit Trail tab is missing from the sidebar.
Backend POST /api/founder/broadcast accepts {message,severity} and returns sent_to:N — but no Broadcast tab in the UI sidebar, no compose textarea, no severity selector.

issues: React 'two children with the same key' warning fires 4× on the founder shell — indicates duplicate React keys somewhere in the sidebar/list rendering. Non-blocking but should be fixed.

action_items: [P0] Wire the iter-14 Audit Trail / System Stats / Broadcast sections into FounderSimple.tsx sidebar nav and route them to their respective backend endpoints (/api/founder/audit, /api/founder/system-stats, /api/founder/broadcast). Currently the sidebar only contains the pre-iter-14 shell.

[P0] Wire the iter-15 Health Watchdog section into FounderSimple.tsx sidebar — 6 service cards (mongo/epra/resend/twilio/daraja/stripe), color-coded summary banner, Probe Now button, 30s UI auto-refresh, backend already returns the full snapshot at GET /api/founder/health?refresh=true.

[P0] Replace the hardcoded mock cards on the Founder Dashboard ($0 revenue / 0 sales / Stations=3 / Coupons=3 / fake 'Sale recorded 2m ago' activity list) with live data from /api/founder/system-stats.

[P1] Render the IntegrationTestPanel below the Save button on the API Keys page (Test Email / Test SMS / Test STK / Test Stripe buttons). Backend endpoint POST /api/founder/integrations/test/{service} requires JSON body {to:'<recipient>', message:'<text>'} — make sure the UI sends those fields.

[P2] In /app/backend/routers/founder_ops.py — when DELETE /founder/integrations/{field} pops os.environ, also restore the original .env value via load_dotenv(override=True) so the .env baseline takes effect again. Otherwise, deleting a runtime-pasted Stripe key permanently breaks Stripe checkout until backend restart.
[P3] Fix the React 'two children with the same key' warning that fires 4× on the Founder shell render.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend iter-13/14/15 code (routers/founder_ops.py, routers/health.py) is well-structured: founder gating via require_founder, audit entries on every mutation, /founder/integrations payload uses snake_case Pydantic fields with a clear _KEY_TO_ENV map, /founder/health returns snapshot with services + summary + age_seconds + ts. Solid implementation.
Frontend side is the gap: FounderSimple.tsx (or whichever Founder shell is currently routed at /#/founder) does not render the iter-14/15 sections at all — they need to be hooked into the sidebar.
/founder/integrations DELETE doesn't reload .env baseline → state divergence. Use load_dotenv(override=False) after pop, OR keep a snapshot of the bootstrap env in a module-level dict for restore.

founder_ops.py:267 test_integration endpoint requires {to, message} body — make sure the IntegrationTestPanel sends these (frontend may need a small modal asking for a test recipient address before firing).

success_rate.frontend: ~25% — Founder login works, JWT saved, API Keys form renders + persists keys; but Audit/Stats/Broadcast/Health are absent and Dashboard is mock-data.

test_credentials: FOUNDER / publican1D#20 — confirmed working. Fresh TEST_iter16_* @fuelpro.app accounts created during sweep (one each per session in user_a/user_b fixtures, password=password123).
seed_data_creation: ~6 TEST_iter16_*@fuelpro.app users in db.users, 1 invite per run, runtime_config doc with stripe_api_key=sk_test_emergent (restored at end of test_save_stripe_key to keep Stripe working).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend iter-13/14/15 endpoints are 100% functional — use /app/backend/tests/test_iter16_sweep.py as regression. Frontend needs Audit Trail / System Stats / Broadcast / Health Watchdog sidebar wiring in FounderSimple.tsx — once the main agent adds them, re-test by navigating /#/founder → click each new sidebar entry. Schemas/payloads to remember: POST /founder/integrations uses lowercase keys (resend_api_key, twilio_account_sid, stripe_api_key, mpesa_consumer_key, etc.); POST /founder/integrations/test/{svc} needs {to,message}; POST /founder/users/{id}/grant-subscription uses {plan, days} NOT tier; GET /founder/health returns {ok, age_seconds, snapshot:{services,summary,ts}}. Cleanup: db.founder_login_log.deleteMany({}) before founder login attempts to avoid rate-limit.
rca of the issue: The Founder Frontend route /#/founder is rendering an older Founder dashboard shell (pre-iter-14) that has 29 admin-style sidebar entries (Users/Stations/Sales/Inventory/Pricing etc.) but lacks the four new iter-14/15 sections. Either (a) FounderSimple.tsx was edited only partially and the navigation array doesn't include the new entries, (b) a different component is being rendered at /#/founder, or (c) the iter-14/15 UI was added but is gated by a feature flag that is off. Main agent should grep `Audit Trail|System Stats|Broadcast|Health Watchdog` inside /app/frontend/src to locate where (if anywhere) those sections are mounted and ensure they are exposed at /#/founder. Backend is 100% ready to serve them.
